dotap_vs_ddab.raw_ratio_note: 5.17/0.39 = 13.3x, driven by 2 outliers (BM=13.0 LNP67 and BM=48.0 LNP85)
dotap_vs_ddab.robust_ratio_note: Without outliers: DOTAP mean 1.56 / DDAB mean 0.39 = 4.0x (still significant, p=0.004)
dotap_vs_ddab.bootstrap_note: 95% CI of DOTAP-DDAB difference excludes zero

dotap_within_c18.note: PEG chain may interact with helper lipid effect

paper_sentence: DOTAP enables approximately 4-fold higher BM delivery than DDAB (Mann-Whitney U, p=0.001), with individual formulations achieving up to 13-fold enrichment. The robust effect size (4x without outliers, p=0.004) supports DOTAP as a specific enabler of BM tropism, distinct from other cationic helpers (DDAB, DOTMA) despite identical charge.
paper_sentence_old: DOTAP achieves 13-fold higher BM delivery than DDAB
correction_note: Session 10a audit (Audit 4) identified that the 13x ratio is outlier-driven. The robust ratio is ~4x. Both are reported in the corrected paper sentence.
